heading: Repealed. ,Oct. 10, 1940, ch. 851, § 454 Stat. 1111
label: 107 Repealed. ,Oct. 10, 1940, ch. 851, § 454 Stat. 1111
notes: Section, , (repeated as a proviso in subsequent appropriations for the Commission), related to procurement of supplies and services. Act , and the similar provisos in subsequent appropriation acts were repealed by act . A similar provision was enacted by act , as part of the consolidated exceptions to section 5 of former Title 41, Public Contracts.
